# mpsc-queue

- **Version:** commit ea09e7b (2024)
- **Source:** <https://github.com/grivet/mpsc-queue>
- **License:** BSD-3-Clause (see file COPYRIGHT in this directory)
- **Downloaded:** 2026-03-16

## Files

- `mpsc-queue.h` -- single-header MPSC lock-free queue (all static inline)
- `COPYRIGHT` -- BSD-3-Clause license text

## Build Flags

Header-only library. No compile flags needed. Requires C11 (`<stdatomic.h>`).

## Modifications

None. File is unmodified from the upstream source.
